title: UDP Lighting Blocks
description: A very light mod that adds very vivid lights, with easy but vanilla-friendly crafting recipes.
body:
# Introduction
Are you sick of only using torches and lanterns to light up your builds? Have you ever wanted other sources of light that fit your build aesthetics? Well... This mod has you covered! 
# What is the 'UDP Lighting Blocks' mod?

Introducing UDP Lighting Blocks!
Adds very vivid, colourful, and bright lights that can be crafted easily, but don't spoil the game's progression, as they have vanilla-friendly recipes. Adds lighting blocks that work well with many different aesthetics, from rustic factories to futuristic space bases; there's a light for it.

# Extras
This mod is growing, and more blocks are on their way. Please make sure to share and follow this mod so I know my time isn't wasted :). Thanks!
Make sure to check out my other mods under my profile!
